title: Eddy (Jake) — Paladin
bodyText:
Fisherman from **Shipton** — except he isn't. White-eyed **Aasimar** paladin (Oath made S07), now confirmed to be **in the wrong body**: Ms. Judy's solo ritual (S16) showed his Shipton family is an old tale, *famously dead* — and they were never Aasimar. Kena added that he may be **far older than he appears** (S15). Carries **Velmir**, Trunks' formerly-cursed shadow sword (curse lifted by Eira).

# What the table knows
- Patchwork memory: real Shipton childhood (sister, carving with mother, knots with father **Kol**) braided with impossible memories — red comet, unfinished symbol, the sun drowning, chained underwater, wanting to die and not being allowed.
- Recurring dreams: Shipton burning, thick water, the red-haired cloaked healer dying for him, the white-haired girl walking away.
- S24 prep: his reflection will be a golden-eyed stranger mouthing **"Remember."**

> [!dm] **The Character Trinity ([[the-pool]]) — locked (grill 2026-07-09):** three beings pulled into the Pool, fused into one walking man.
> - **Body = Lathander's avatar** — sent out of the pool with Leliana's help; unlockable divine power. Freeing the god is the Chapter-1 climax ([[lathander]], [[arc-chapter-1]]).
> - **Mind = the Shipton fisherman** Jake plays — plausibly **Edrelon**, Kol's son ("The Priest's Descent": the boy who fled the drowning town). The surface memory-set.
> - **Soul = Silus**, an **Eladrin of the Feywild** (was parked as Jake's planned character with partner **Gwen** — now canon as Eddy's true soul; see [[ideas-parking-lot]]).
> The caged voice wants "him" **brought back** — these three untangled.

# The Eddy-or-Silus choice (grill 2026-07-09)
The Pool climax includes a moment where **Jake decides who he wants to be — Eddy or Silus.** Kept emergent, not scripted. Currently being *teased*: Eddy is starting to see "Silus stuff." Seed planted last session — his new **Familiar**, a weird **mimicking bird from the Feywild** that has wandered the depths a long time **searching for Silus** ([[the-familiar]]). It found him — inside Eddy.
